name: Stability AI MCP Server
what_it_does: Stability AI MCP server enabling AI agents to generate images via Stability AI's API — creating images from text prompts with Stable Diffusion models (SDXL, SD3, Stable Image), inpainting and outpainting, image-to-image transformation, and integrating Stability AI's generative image capabilities into agent-driven creative and content production workflows.
use_cases: Generating images from text descriptions from creative content agents
Creating product visuals and marketing assets from brand content agents
Inpainting and editing existing images from visual editing agents
Building automated illustration pipelines from content creation agents
Generating concept art and prototypes from design ideation agents
Creating custom training images for fine-tuning from AI research agents
not_for: Teams preferring DALL-E or Midjourney (different providers)
Real-time video generation (Stability AI focuses on images)
Teams with content policy conflicts (generated content must follow Stability AI ToS)
best_when: An agent needs programmatic access to Stability AI's image generation models — particularly for SDXL quality images, SD3 for photo-realistic output, or Stable Image for production use.
avoid_when: You prefer DALL-E 3, Midjourney, or self-hosted Stable Diffusion via ComfyUI.

auth.notes: Stability AI API key required. Obtain from platform.stability.ai. Credits purchased per image generation. API key grants access to all Stability AI endpoints.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — credit-based pricing only
pricing.notes: Stability AI is credit-based — no free tier. New accounts may receive trial credits. Community MCP is free open source. Image generation costs vary by model.

performance.rate_limits: Stability AI: concurrent request limits per plan; credit-rate-limited

known_agent_gotchas: Credit costs accrue per generation — monitor usage to control costs
Image generation is slow (3-15 seconds) — design agent workflows for async handling
Stability AI model names change with new releases — verify current model IDs
Generated images have usage rights per Stability AI ToS — commercial use allowed
Community MCP from andybrandt — experienced AI tools developer
API response includes base64-encoded images — handle large payloads appropriately
agent_readiness.security_notes: API key auth. HTTPS enforced. Real cost per generation — monitor credits. Store API key in env var. Community MCP. Follow Stability AI ToS for generated content.

security_score_components.security_notes: API key. HTTPS. Real credit costs. Store key in env var. Community MCP. Follow Stability AI content ToS.
